flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Big Bend Community College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Big Bend Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Big Bend Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $5.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Big Bend Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
